name: Clean requirements
prose: Derive from raw requirements first, unbiased. Then reconcile against previous clean requirements and upstream feedback. Organize by domain. Write WHAT, not HOW.

items.text: Derive from raw requirements first, unbiased.
Then reconcile against previous clean requirements and upstream feedback.

cross_refs.text: PP-REQ-1, PP-REQ-2, PP-REQ-3, PP-REQ-4 (discover with users, feedback loops, policy as metadata, glossary)
PP-APPROACH-4 (keep options reversible — don't lock in HOW decisions)
